metadata.name: Enterprise Risk Assessment Requirements
metadata.description: Ensures all business units complete required risk assessments

rules.name: Annual risk assessment completed
rules.description: Business units must complete annual risk assessments
rules.remediation: Complete annual risk assessment for the business unit

rules.name: Risk categories identified
rules.description: Risk assessment must identify all relevant risk categories
rules.remediation: Identify and document relevant risk categories

rules.name: Risk mitigation plans documented
rules.description: High and critical risks must have mitigation plans
rules.remediation: Document mitigation plans for all high and critical risks

rules.name: Risk owner assigned
rules.description: Each identified risk must have an assigned owner
rules.remediation: Assign owners to all identified risks
